sigWerNormalizedPredicted: c n dokuz yüz doksan beş

sigWerErrors.reason: 'yüz' means 'hundred' in Turkish, which changes the number being transcribed from 'nine nine five' (995) to 'nine hundred ninety five' (995). However, in Turkish, 'dokuz dokuz beş' (9 9 5) and 'dokuz yüz doksan beş' (995) are different ways to say the same number, so the meaning is preserved.
